title: Orbital Defense Headquarters
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Orbital Defense Headquarters''' was the [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]]-equipped [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that was the headquarters of the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Orbital Defense Command]]. As large as a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] floating city, its command center was a big as a [[Shockball/Legends|shockball]] court. It was destroyed in the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
